vibe: Modern minimal, tactile, distinctive, warm, spacious, high-readability

global_rules.spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 extensively. Containers with borders MUST have generous padding to avoid text collisions.
global_rules.borders_and_radius: Subtle border-radius max 8px (rounded-md/rounded-lg). Use thin 1px borders (#E5E2DC) to separate sections rather than heavy shadows.
global_rules.shadows: Very minimal. Use shadow-sm for cards or inputs, and shadow-md for dropdowns/modals. Avoid heavy dark shadows.
global_rules.data_testids: All interactive elements MUST include kebab-case, role-based data-testid attributes.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Mode B (Control Room Grid): Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. KPI cards take 1 col, primary charts take 2-3 cols, activity feed takes 1 col. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.
layout_strategies.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Clean list, un-bordered icons. Active state uses subtle gray background with terracotta left-border or icon color.
layout_strategies.header: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70) if content scrolls under, or solid bg-white with 1px border-b.
layout_strategies.kanban_board: Horizontal scroll container. Columns have background #F4F2EE, rounded-lg, p-4. Deal cards are background #FFFFFF, rounded-md, p-4, shadow-sm, cursor-grab. Clean typography on cards (Title, Value, Due Date, Avatar).
layout_strategies.tables: Clean data tables. Left-aligned text. 1px bottom border for rows. Hover state on rows. No vertical borders.

buttons.primary: bg-terracotta text-white hover:bg-terracotta-hover transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm data-testid='{role}-btn'
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-charcoal border border-border-default hover:bg-app-bg transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-taupe hover:text-charcoal hover:bg-app-bg transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.default: border border-border-default rounded-md px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-terracotta/20 focus:border-terracotta bg-white text-charcoal placeholder-taupe/50 outline-none transition-all data-testid='{role}-input'

cards.default: bg-white border border-border-default rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col h-full
cards.kpi: bg-white border border-border-default rounded-lg p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

ai_panel.container: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F4F2EE] to-[#EAF0F6] border border-border-default rounded-lg p-6
ai_panel.button: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary-hover rounded-md px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 font-medium shadow-sm

animations.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-1) for cards, color transitions (duration-200) for buttons.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y-4 to 0) for list items and grid cards using framer-motion.
animations.drag_drop: Scale up slightly (scale-105) and increase shadow while dragging a kanban card.

auth_background.description: Abstract architecture with warm sunlight for the login/register page split screen.

empty_state_dashboard.description: Clean minimalist office desk to be used in 'No upcoming tasks' or welcome empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure fonts (Outfit, Manrope) are loaded via Google Fonts (@import in css or link in index.html).
Map colors in tailwind.config.js exactly as specified in the color_palette. e.g. terracotta: '#D96C4A', app-bg: '#F9F8F6', charcoal: '#1C1B1A'.

Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override classes to remove the 'Vercel-look'. Replace border-border with border-border-default (#E5E2DC). Cards should NOT use heavy drop shadows, rely on 1px borders instead.
Implement the Kanban board using a robust DnD library (e.g. @dnd-kit/core) making sure columns are horizontally scrollable if needed without visible standard scrollbars.
AI Panels and Insight Buttons must use the secondary color (#3D405B) for high contrast and to distinguish AI actions from user primary actions (#D96C4A).
IMPORTANT: Apply `data-testid` explicitly on EVERY interactive component (buttons, inputs, form rows, tabs, kanban cards) following kebab-case, role-based naming.
